title: ERROR/WHY/FIX denial-message contract in 07-contracts + string audit + tests
action: Per D8: 07-contracts.md gains the refusal-message contract — every refusal from bin/lib or a hook names (1) the rule that fired, (2) why, (3) the next command or action. Audit every user-facing refusal string in guards.mjs and cells.mjs against it; rewrite only non-compliant ones. Add test_lib assertions that the cap-refusal, gate-block, and reservation-conflict messages each carry a next action. Re-onboard to sync vendored lib if lib strings changed.

truths: No refusal ends at 'not allowed' without a stated next step

artifacts.substantive: contract section with the three elements and one example

prohibitions: No behavior change to the guard/cap logic itself — strings and docs only

trace.outcome: Contract section added to 07-contracts (ERROR/WHY/FIX, three elements, example); audit found strings largely compliant — two claimCell messages strengthened (gate refusal now routes to Gate 3, wrong-status names bee_cells ready); three shape assertions added (cap-refusal, gate-block, reservation-conflict); 41/0 + onboarding suite green; vendored lib re-synced.
